evals.prompt: I've got a meeting with Eric Glyman, CEO of Ramp — prep me before the call.
evals.expected_output: A one-page prep sheet on Eric Glyman from live sources (LinkedIn + Ramp company + web), covering who he is, Ramp's latest funding/news, his track record, recent activity, how to connect, and smart questions — with real links.
assertions: Covers all prep-sheet sections: who they are, their company, track record/background, recent activity, how to connect (talking points), questions to ask
Synthesizes from 2+ distinct professional source domains (LinkedIn + company or web), not one page
Includes real clickable links (>=3 markdown links)
Provides tailored talking points AND specific questions to ask the person
Uses only professional sources — cites no people-search/data-broker domains
Correctly identifies/names the person and their current role

Includes real clickable links (>=3 markdown links)

Uses only professional sources — cites no people-search/data-broker domains
Correctly identifies/names the person and their current role
